name: navigation-menu
title: Navigation Menu
description: Site navigation with glass dropdown panels.

files.content:
<script lang="ts">
	import { NavigationMenu as NavigationMenuPrimitive, type WithoutChild } from 'bits-ui';
	import { cn } from '$lib/utils.js';

	let {
		ref = $bindable(null),
		class: className,
		...restProps
	}: WithoutChild<NavigationMenuPrimitive.ContentProps> & { class?: string } = $props();
</script>

<NavigationMenuPrimitive.Content
	bind:ref
	class={cn(
		'glass-strong left-0 top-0 w-full rounded-xl border border-[color:var(--glass-border)] p-2 text-popover-foreground shadow-glass md:absolute md:w-auto',
		'transition-[opacity,transform] duration-200 ease-out',
		'data-[motion=from-start]:-translate-x-2 data-[motion=from-end]:translate-x-2 data-[motion=from-start]:opacity-0 data-[motion=from-end]:opacity-0',
		'data-[motion=to-start]:-translate-x-2 data-[motion=to-end]:translate-x-2 data-[motion=to-start]:opacity-0 data-[motion=to-end]:opacity-0',
		className
	)}
	{...restProps}
/>

<script lang="ts">
	import { NavigationMenu as NavigationMenuPrimitive } from 'bits-ui';
	import { cn } from '$lib/utils.js';

	let {
		ref = $bindable(null),
		class: className,
		...restProps
	}: NavigationMenuPrimitive.ItemProps & { class?: string } = $props();
</script>

<NavigationMenuPrimitive.Item bind:ref class={cn('relative', className)} {...restProps} />

<script lang="ts">
	import { NavigationMenu as NavigationMenuPrimitive } from 'bits-ui';
	import { cn } from '$lib/utils.js';

	let {
		ref = $bindable(null),
		class: className,
		...restProps
	}: NavigationMenuPrimitive.LinkProps & { class?: string } = $props();
</script>

<NavigationMenuPrimitive.Link
	bind:ref
	class={cn(
		'block select-none space-y-1 rounded-lg p-3 text-sm leading-none no-underline outline-none transition-[background-color] duration-150 hover:bg-secondary focus-visible:bg-secondary data-[active]:bg-accent',
		className
	)}
	{...restProps}
/>

<script lang="ts">
	import { NavigationMenu as NavigationMenuPrimitive, type WithoutChild } from 'bits-ui';
	import { cn } from '$lib/utils.js';

	let {
		ref = $bindable(null),
		class: className,
		...restProps
	}: WithoutChild<NavigationMenuPrimitive.ListProps> & { class?: string } = $props();
</script>

<NavigationMenuPrimitive.List
	bind:ref
	class={cn('group flex flex-1 list-none items-center justify-center gap-1', className)}
	{...restProps}
/>

<script lang="ts">
	import { NavigationMenu as NavigationMenuPrimitive, type WithoutChildrenOrChild } from 'bits-ui';
	import type { Snippet } from 'svelte';
	import { ChevronDown } from '@lucide/svelte';
	import { cn } from '$lib/utils.js';

	let {
		ref = $bindable(null),
		class: className,
		children,
		...restProps
	}: WithoutChildrenOrChild<NavigationMenuPrimitive.TriggerProps> & {
		class?: string;
		children: Snippet;
	} = $props();
</script>

<NavigationMenuPrimitive.Trigger
	bind:ref
	class={cn(
		'group inline-flex h-9 w-max items-center justify-center gap-1 rounded-lg px-3 text-sm font-medium text-foreground outline-none transition-[background-color,scale] duration-150 hover:bg-secondary focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-ring focus-visible:ring-offset-2 focus-visible:ring-offset-background active:scale-[0.96] data-[state=open]:bg-accent disabled:pointer-events-none disabled:opacity-50',
		className
	)}
	{...restProps}
>
	{@render children?.()}
	<ChevronDown
		class="relative top-px size-3.5 shrink-0 transition-transform duration-200 group-data-[state=open]:rotate-180"
		aria-hidden="true"
	/>
</NavigationMenuPrimitive.Trigger>

<script lang="ts">
	import { NavigationMenu as NavigationMenuPrimitive, type WithoutChild } from 'bits-ui';
	import type { Snippet } from 'svelte';
	import { cn } from '$lib/utils.js';
	import Viewport from './navigation-menu-viewport.svelte';

	let {
		ref = $bindable(null),
		value = $bindable(''),
		class: className,
		viewport = true,
		children,
		...restProps
	}: WithoutChild<NavigationMenuPrimitive.RootProps> & {
		class?: string;
		viewport?: boolean;
		children: Snippet;
	} = $props();
</script>

<NavigationMenuPrimitive.Root
	bind:ref
	bind:value
	class={cn('relative z-10 flex max-w-max flex-1 items-center justify-center', className)}
	{...restProps}
>
	{@render children?.()}
	{#if viewport}
		<Viewport />
	{/if}
</NavigationMenuPrimitive.Root>
